objective: Find directly downloadable row-level event/social/on-chain or direct L2/L3/order-lifecycle datasets for the active Manipulation root gate.

sources.name: Bayi-Hu/Pump-and-Dump-Detection-on-Cryptocurrency
sources.notes: Repository README says the P&D logs contain 1,335 samples and 709 observed Telegram P&Ds. Local raw probes confirm a directly downloadable cleaned event log with coin, exchange, pair, and timestamp fields. This still needs an unchanged chronological gate with negative controls and/or aligned market features before acceptance.

sources.name: SystemsLab-Sapienza/gme-pump-xrp-telegram
sources.notes: Repository contains Telegram group messages, files, videos, and images for the OFFICIAL BUY & HOLD XRP group. It is useful social provenance, but no structured positive/negative event table was found in this scan.

sources.name: cakcora/chartalist

local_probe.direct_csv_url_probe_result: HTTP 200 text/html, not CSV row data

sources.notes: The dataloader source lists IDEXTrades.csv, EtherDeltaTrades.csv, and EtherDollarPrice.csv, but direct URL probes returned the site HTML shell. The listed datasets are transaction/anomaly inputs without an explicit manipulation label column in the dataloader metadata.

sources.name: Jananigaekwad/Group-3-Wash-Trading-Case-Study-for-ERC20-Token
sources.notes: The repository includes a directly downloadable normalized ERC20 transaction CSV, but the README frames anomaly detection as unsupervised and the sampled columns did not include an explicit wash-trade label.

sources.name: dianxiang-sun/rug_pull_dataset
sources.notes: This is a validated DeFi security incident dataset. It is useful adjacent on-chain fraud context, but it is not an exchange/order-flow manipulation event ledger for the current MainRegimeV2 gate.

next_action: Create a bounded unchanged Manipulation event/social gate using the Bayi-Hu cleaned P&D event log plus available message labels, with chronological split and explicit negative controls or market-feature alignment. Do not count it as acceptance until that gate passes.
